## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes (lint, formatting, tests)
- [ ] New logic in the pure layer (geometry, scene, mutations) is covered by tests
- [ ] No new runtime dependency added to the component
- [ ] The model JSON stays interchangeable with Isoflow/FossFLOW
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if the public API changed
